project: Craft Silicon Booth QR - Stitch Masterpiece

styling_rules.material: Frosted glass panels (backdrop-blur: 32px) with sharp 0.5px white borders.
styling_rules.typography: Inter Bold for headlines, Inter Regular for body. -0.022em tracking.
styling_rules.constraints: Strictly NO gradients. NO atmospheric glows. Minimalist solid fields only.

prompts.name: The Liquid Greeting
prompts.stitch_prompt: Mobile interface, solid deep navy background (#071426). A perfectly centered, minimalist white Craft Silicon logo. Large, thick typography: 'Welcome to Precision.' Solid white. Below, a pill-shaped button in solid CS-Blue (#0A6AE2) with the text 'Connect'. No shadows, no gradients, flat lighting, high contrast, museum-quality minimalist UI.

prompts.name: Identity Collection
prompts.stitch_prompt: Mobile conversational UI screen. Solid navy background (#071426). Floating glass panel centered, 70% opaque, 32px blur, sharp 1px white solid border line. Text in panel: 'Let's begin with your name.' centered, pure white bold Inter font. Input field is a single solid white line. No glow, high precision flat design, top-tier spacing.

prompts.name: The Context Dialog
prompts.stitch_prompt: Minimalist mobile screen. Background #071426. A large bold question: 'Which organization are you from?' in vibrant white. Below it, an input field styled as a solid flat card of #0D2045 with a solid blue border (#0A6AE2). No gradients, no shadows. Balanced whitespace, editorial layout style.

prompts.name: Refractive Showcase
prompts.stitch_prompt: Mobile product selection screen. Solid #071426 background. A grid of four perfectly flat rectangular cards in #0D2045. Top-left card is selected, highlighted with a solid 2px CS-Blue (#0A6AE2) border. Each card contains a minimalist white icon. No inner glows, no drop shadows. Clean, technical, professional banking aesthetic.

prompts.name: The Reach-Out Node
prompts.stitch_prompt: Mobile screen for final data entry. Two stacked minimalist inputs with solid white underlines on a flat navy background. Labels above inputs are tiny, uppercase, and 40% gray-white. A solid CS-Blue (#0A6AE2) 'Complete' button at the bottom. Ultra-high precision, no gradients, no glow.

prompts.name: The Victory Zenith
prompts.stitch_prompt: Mobile success screen. Solid deep navy background (#071426). A single solid CS-Blue (#0A6AE2) circular ring in the center with a flat white checkmark. Large headline: 'Insights Incoming.' Small progress dots at the bottom. Flat design, minimalist masterpiece, no gradients.

composition_rules: Golden ratio focus: Primary content sits in the upper 40% of the screen.
Active button: Always fixed to the bottom safety area (48px from edge).
Negative space: Maintain 32px minimum gutter between all elements.
Contrast: Use pure white #FFFFFF for primary text on #071426 background.
